subtitle: Overtime Request
deadlineNote: Request overtime by 15:00 the same day. Once approved, you can enter an end time beyond the site's fixed end for that day.
deadlinePassed: Today's overtime request window has closed (until 15:00).
statusApproved: Approved (you can enter beyond the fixed end)
errorDeadline: Past the deadline (15:00 same day); cannot request.
